diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -29,9 +29,16 @@
     if os.path.exists(args.linear_model):

         print('Using linear model.')

         linear = np.load(args.linear_model)

-        W = linear['W'].astype(np.float32)

+        W = linear['W'].astype(np.float32)  # could be (128,124) from sklearn or (124,128) from manual solve

         b = linear['b'].astype(np.float32)

-        predictions = test_inputs @ W.T + b

+        if W.shape[0] == 124 and W.shape[1] == 128:

+            # W stored as (n_features, n_targets) — multiply without transpose

+            predictions = test_inputs @ W + b

+        elif W.shape[0] == 128 and W.shape[1] == 124:

+            # W stored as (n_targets, n_features) — need transpose

+            predictions = test_inputs @ W.T + b

+        else:

+            raise ValueError(f'Unexpected linear weight shape: {W.shape}, expected (124,128) or (128,124)')

     elif os.path.exists(args.checkpoint):

         checkpoint = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device, weights_only=False)

         model_config = checkpoint['model_config']
